description: Per-file exemption list for lint:role-literals (PLA-0007 / Story 00305). Each entry is a repo-relative path with at least one role-string compare (e.g. `user.role === 'gadmin'`) recorded BEFORE the AuthContext + useHasPermission migration. Files listed here warn-but-do-not-fail. Each later PLA-0007 migration story removes its file(s) from this list as it converts the gates to useHasPermission(...) calls — that's the regression-prevention mechanism. The end state is an EMPTY exempt_paths array; once empty, treat it as a hard architectural invariant.
